original_image_tags: black-and-white photograph of two men. Left: Schmidt (left), wearing glasses and a suit. Right: Kearney Police Chief Nelson, wearing a suit and tie. They are seated at a table with a microphone between them. Caption: "Schmidt (left) and Kearney Police Chief Nelson... In 'heart-to-heart' talk."
Hand-drawn sketches of the described craft.

elements.description: A black and white photograph of two men (captioned Schmidt and Kearney Police Chief Nelson) looking at a microphone.
A line drawing labeled 'SIDE VIEW OUTSIDE' depicting a disc-shaped object with landing gear. Text inside the sketch reads 'LENGTH: APPROX. 100 FEET'.

A floor plan diagram labeled 'FLOOR PLAN INSIDE' showing a circular layout with labeled sections including 'INSTRUMENTS', 'LOUNGE', 'SEALED COMPARTMENT', 'FAN IN ROOF', and 'CONVEYOR TO BACK OF SHIP'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on a black-and-white photograph of two men (Schmidt and Kearney Police Chief Nelson) with a microphone, and on the presence of hand-drawn sketches of a craft; the specific text quoted in the captions is consistent ('Schmidt (left) and Kearney Police Chief Nelson' and 'SIDE VIEW OUTSIDE'/'FLOOR PLAN INSIDE').
